source: Central Electricity Authority (CEA), CO2 Baseline Database, 2024
methodology: IPCC 2006 Guidelines for National Greenhouse Gas Inventories

solar_generation.description: CO2 avoided per kWh of solar energy generated
solar_generation.notes: Based on India weighted average grid emission factor

water_savings.description: CO2 avoided per 1000L of water saved through agrivoltaic microclimate
water_savings.notes: Energy for pumping + treatment (0.42 kWh/m3 x 0.82 kg/kWh)

bio_cooling.description: Additional CO2 offset from bio-cooling effect on panels
bio_cooling.notes: Based on 3% efficiency gain per °C reduction

crop_carbon_sequestration.description: CO2 sequestered by crops per hectare per season

methane_reduction.description: CH4 reduction from Alternate Wetting and Drying (AWD) irrigation
methane_reduction.notes: AWD reduces methane by 48% compared to continuous flooding

soc_estimation.description: Soil Organic Carbon sequestration estimation parameters
soc_estimation.method: SVR on ESA Sentinel-2 NIR bands (B4, B8, B11)
soc_estimation.notes: Panel shading reduces evapotranspiration, increasing SOC accumulation by 25%

compliance_market.notes: India Carbon Credit Trading Scheme (CCTS) expected prices
